titleEn: World Cup prediction standings remain close as deadline for final picks approaches
contentHtml: Although the differences at the top of FreshPublishers' World Cup Pool are small, many of the same names remain in the leading positions as the final group-stage matches approach.  Guido de Bruijn of Agrofair remains in the lead, followed by Mark Libregts of JNV Produce. Sandro Miglino of Italian lettuce and…
